infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AirportWaze needs your location for turn-by-turn airport navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AirportWaze uses your location for real-time navigation and connection alerts.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Motion data improves indoor positioning accuracy.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: AirportWaze uses speech recognition so you can navigate hands-free while carrying luggage.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AirportWaze uses the microphone to listen for your voice commands.

plugins.microphonePermission: AirportWaze uses the microphone to listen for voice commands.
